visa_types.documents_required:
[tur > ind > en > Table:Montage Visa > Visa Fees 2]

[tur > ind > en > Table:Montage Visa > Visa Fees 3]

[tur > ind > en > Table:Montage Visa > Visa Fees 4]
Jurisdiction
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > ben > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]
IMPORTANT NOTE 1
There are certain rules to apply for Multiple Entry Visa. Therefore; your documents must be checked and verified by our visa officers to find out whether or not you are eligible for Multiple Entry Türkiye Visa. 
IMPORTANT NOTE 2
A portion of the total Türkiye Visa fee ( INR 6890/-) will be charged online when you book your appointment. You will pay the remaining amount at our offices via cash, UPI or POS payment (credit card, debit card).
For example: If you are applying for a 3 months Türkiye visa, you charged INR 6890 during the appointment booking as online. Rest amount 18120 - 6890 = 11230 INR will be requested from you at our offices.
visa_types.processing_time:
Please Note: -
- Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Turkey Embassy/Consulate, India.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
VFS Global will accept applications as per the document checklists provided by the Turkey Embassy/Consulate General in India.
Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in India can apply maximum 60 days in advance.
Kindly note that all the documents for the Application Form must be as per requirement, if the documents are incorrect or not as per the requirement then a new Application form will have to be filled.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
VFS Global will accept applications as per the document checklists provided by the Turkey Embassy/Consulate General in India.
Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in India can apply maximum 60 days in advance.
Kindly note that all the documents for the Application Form must be as per requirement, if the documents are incorrect or not as per the requirement then a new Application form will have to be filled.

## Visa Fees

[tur > ben > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]
IMPORTANT NOTE 1
There are certain rules to apply for Multiple Entry Visa. Therefore; your documents must be checked and verified by our visa officers to find out whether or not you are eligible for Multiple Entry Türkiye Visa. 
IMPORTANT NOTE 2
A portion of the total Türkiye Visa fee ( INR 6890/-) will be charged online when you book your appointment. You will pay the remaining amount at our offices via cash, UPI or POS payment (credit card, debit card).
For example: If you are applying for a 3 months Türkiye visa, you charged INR 6890 during the appointment booking as online. Rest amount 18120 - 6890 = 11230 INR will be requested from you at our offices.

## Documents Required

[tur > ind > en > Table:Montage Visa > Visa Fees 2]

[tur > ind > en > Table:Montage Visa > Visa Fees 3]

[tur > ind > en > Table:Montage Visa > Visa Fees 4]
Jurisdiction

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 2.5x 2.5 Inch White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Processing Time
Please Note: -
- Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Turkey Embassy/Consulate, India.

## Application Form
Visa Application Form
- Please note that all fields are mandatory to be captured in Application form
- Also note that incase the applicants Surname/ First name is not mentioned or is blank in his/ her passport then the field must be repeated with the same name on the Application Form.
- Applicant’s complete name as per passport must be mentioned in the application form.

Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in India can apply maximum 60 days in advance.
Kindly note that all the documents for the Application Form must be as per requirement, if the documents are incorrect or not as per the requirement then a new Application form will have to be filled.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
VFS Global will accept applications as per the document checklists provided by the Turkey Embassy/Consulate General in India.
Applicants who are applying at the Turkey visa application center in India can apply maximum 60 days in advance.
Kindly note that all the documents for the Application Form must be as per requirement, if the documents are incorrect or not as per the requirement then a new Application form will have to be filled.

## Visa Fees

[tur > ben > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]
IMPORTANT NOTE 1
There are certain rules to apply for Multiple Entry Visa. Therefore; your documents must be checked and verified by our visa officers to find out whether or not you are eligible for Multiple Entry Türkiye Visa. 
IMPORTANT NOTE 2
A portion of the total Türkiye Visa fee ( INR 6890/-) will be charged online when you book your appointment. You will pay the remaining amount at our offices via cash, UPI or POS payment (credit card, debit card).
For example: If you are applying for a 3 months Türkiye visa, you charged INR 6890 during the appointment booking as online. Rest amount 18120 - 6890 = 11230 INR will be requested from you at our offices.

## Documents Required

[tur > ind > en > Table:Medical Visa > Visa Fees 2]

[tur > ind > en > Table:Medical Visa > Visa Fees 3]

[tur > ind > en > Table:Medical Visa > Visa Fees 4]

Jurisdiction

## Photo Specifications
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 2.5x 2.5 Inch White Background
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 6 months old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- It should be without hat/cap and without spectacles.
- It should be a portrait style image, with a neutral expression (no smiling or grinning)
- It should be without the applicant's hair tucked behind his/her ears.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.

## Processing Time
Please Note: -
- Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Turkey Embassy/Consulate, India.

## Application Form
Visa Application Form
- Please note that all fields are mandatory to be captured in Application form
- Also note that incase the applicants Surname/ First name is not mentioned or is blank in his/ her passport then the field must be repeated with the same name on the Application Form.
- Applicant’s complete name as per passport must be mentioned in the application form.

For example: If you are applying for a 3 months Türkiye visa, you charged INR 6890 during the appointment booking as online. Rest amount 18120 - 6890 = 11230 INR will be requested from you at our offices.
